scope.target: Conditional micro-system/mono-system repository profiles and CrossCutting Observability guidance

Domain must not depend on runtime AOP by default
Keep runtime CrossCutting separate from Tooling
non_goals: Review or modify dotnet-webapi-lab product code

steps: Define Observability ports/adapters and dependency boundary

results.residual_risk: Observability is supplemental evidence not yet a stable assessment finding.
